A.evidence: Prose faithful and footnote inlined correctly; all four equations rendered as clean numbered LaTeX (z_0=[x_class;...], y=LN(z_L^0)), but Table 1 is entirely omitted (text jumps from the datasets paragraph straight to the VTAB paragraph).

B.evidence: Table 1 rendered as a correct markdown grid (Base 12/768/3072/12/86M etc.), but equations 1-3 are emitted as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' and Eq. 4 is shattered into single-character lines (y / = LN( / z / L / )), so the method math is lost.

C.evidence: All four equations in faithful LaTeX with proper \mathbf/\mathbb and Table 1 correct; only blemish is pervasive citation-link/anchor markup noise like '[\(Vaswani et al., 2017\)](#page-11-0)' peppered through the prose.

D.evidence: Table 1 columns misaligned ('Hidden size' and 'D' split into two columns, values shifted, Params left empty); Eq. 2 shows 'MS(' instead of 'MSA(' and prose has scrambled glyph 'multihedead selfattention'; text otherwise readable.
